feature.name: Structure/unstructure core
feature.description: Extract cattrs Converter with structure/unstructure for attrs classes, dataclasses, and nested dict/list payloads with generated dict hooks and field overrides, without original cattrs import.
included_behaviors: round-trip attrs and dataclass instances through dict payloads
structure and unstructure nested mappings and sequences
register custom dict structure/unstructure hooks via gen helpers
apply per-field rename and omit_if_default overrides
reject extra dict keys when forbid_extra_keys is enabled
excluded_behaviors: preconf JSON/YAML/msgpack adapters and third-party codec integrations
strategies package for union/subclass hook registry explosion
GenConverter code generation and transform_error validation helpers
upstream tests, docs, benchmarks, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: cattrs couples attrs/dataclass introspection, multi-strategy hook dispatch, generated dict hooks, collection factories, and validation errors across converters, dispatch, gen, and _compat modules while depending on attrs metadata.
signals: MultiStrategyDispatch resolves structure hooks by type predicates
make_dict_structure_fn compiles per-field overrides into closures
cols/_compat bridge attrs fields, dataclasses, and typing generics
forbid_extra_keys and nested payloads share ClassValidationError paths

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Converter, structure, unstructure; from featurelifted.gen import make_dict_structure_fn, make_dict_unstructure_fn, override; from featurelifted.errors import ClassValidationError, ForbiddenExtraKeysError
